memoryArtifacts.description: The Battle of the Standard, sometimes called the Battle of Northallerton, took place on 22 August 1138 on Cowton Moor near Northallerton in Yorkshire. English forces under William of Aumale repelled a Scottish army led by King David I of Scotland.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Gospatric II於1062年1月出生在蘇格蘭時，他的父親Gospatric I Earl of Northumbria23歲，母親Æthelreda of England19歲。他於1095年之前與Sybil Morel在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴鄧巴結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1138年8月22日在英國越可爾諾薩勒頓享年76歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gospatric II于1062年1月出生在苏格兰时，他的父亲Gospatric I Earl of Northumbria23岁，母亲Æthelreda of England19岁。他于1095年之前与Sybil Morel在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾鄧巴鄧巴结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1138年8月22日在英国越可爾諾薩勒頓享年76岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Gospatric II was born in January 1062, in Scotland, his father, Gospatric I Earl of Northumbria, was 23 and his mother, Æthelreda of England, was 19. He married Sybil Morel before 1095, in Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 22 August 1138, in Northallerton, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 76, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gospatric II est né en janvier 1062, à Écosse, son père, Gospatric I Earl of Northumbria, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Æthelreda of England, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Sybil Morel avant 1095, à Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 22 août 1138, à Northallerton, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gospatric II im Januar 1062 in Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gospatric I Earl of Northumbria 23 und seine Mutter Æthelreda of England 19. Er hat vor 1095 in Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland Sybil Morel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 22. August 1138 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Northallerton, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gospatric II è nato il nel gennaio 1062 nel Scotland, il suo padre, Gospatric I Earl of Northumbria, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Æthelreda of England, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Sybil Morel prima del 1095, nel Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 22 agosto 1138, nel Northallerton, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Gospatric IIが1062年1月にスコットランドで生まれた時，父Gospatric I Earl of Northumbriaは23歳，母Æthelreda of Englandは19歳であった。1095年以前にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーダンバーでSybil Morelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1138年8月22日にイギリスヨークシュアイアノーサラートンで76歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gospatric II(이)가 1062년 1월 스컷랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gospatric I Earl of Northumbria(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Æthelreda of England(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1095년 이전 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바 던바에서 Sybil Morel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1138년 8월 22일 영국 요르크실르 노르솔레르턴에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gospatric II nasceu em janeiro de 1062, em Scotland, seu pai, Gospatric I Earl of Northumbria, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Æthelreda of England, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Sybil Morel antes 1095, em Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de agosto de 1138, em Northallerton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gospatric II родился январь 1062 г. в местности Шотландия, его отцу по имени Gospatric I Earl of Northumbria было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Æthelreda of England, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Sybil Morel перед 1095 г. в местности дунбар, дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 22 августа 1138 г. в местности нортоллиртон, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gospatric II nació en enero de 1062, en Scotland, su papá, Gospatric I Earl of Northumbria, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Æthelreda of England, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Sybil Morel antes de 1095, en Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 22 de agosto de 1138, en Northallerton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
